summary: Plan 04 is executable after repair: AWS startup now validates settings, logical targets, runtime-directory shape, connectivity, and both schemas before auth or service mutation; errors are redacted, retry and engine lifecycles are bounded, and DDL-free behavior has a zero-skip PostgreSQL proof.

review_basis.head: aa323093853550cac8744c85ab735936294c87ec
review_basis.baseline: Current create_app, LocalAuthProvider, FilesystemPayloadStore, LandscapeDB, repaired Plans 01-03, AWS ECS readiness spec, and Plans 05/10/11/12 handoffs.

resolved_findings.resolution: Plan 04 now consumes require_distinct_postgres_targets after valid Plan 01 URLs and before every directory, auth, engine, or probe action.
AWS schema validation moved ahead of eager LocalAuthProvider construction, with an auth.db-absence regression test on failure.
The startup gate covers data, explicit payload, and blob directories; payload symlink and unsafe-mode rules match FilesystemPayloadStore before auth mutation.
Startup uses raw URLs, Plan 02 pool kwargs, session-first connection-bound probes, Landscape finally-disposal, and BaseException-safe session disposal.
Retry scheduling reserves the connection timeout, clips sleeps, rechecks the deadline after sleep, and translates terminal database/schema failures to static unchained errors.
Path derivation, stat, and resolution failures are translated at the boundary without leaking configured paths.
The Docker proof moved to tests/testcontainer, uses DDL-denied runtime roles plus catalog fingerprints, and Docker absence or skips are BLOCKED.
Focused, subsystem, Ruff, format, strict mypy, diff-check, and Wardline handoff gates are explicit.
Plans 03 and 05 now reject payload paths startup would reject, and all directory prose consistently assigns provisioning to the operator rather than --init-schema.
Plan 12 now owns the exact three-file PostgreSQL command and requires zero skips.

verification: git diff --check on Plan 04 and its Plan 03/05/12/overview handoffs
current create_app and LocalAuthProvider ordering verified
current FilesystemPayloadStore symlink and permission contract verified
current Plan 02 target, probe, pool, and exception contracts reconciled
PostgreSQL 16 DDL-denied runtime-role behavior independently verified by the reality reviewer
four-lens post-repair review reached GO with no remaining blockers

review_history.summary: Initial review found missing target separation, post-auth validation, incomplete mount gating, unsafe lifecycle/redaction behavior, stale Docker ownership, and absent final gates.
